zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar於1530年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，她的父親Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar30歲，母親Catharina Kennedy23歲。她於1549年8月2日與Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾特藍特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1604年11月13日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾雷福盧享年74歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安特藍特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar于1530年出生在苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾时，她的父亲Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar30岁，母亲Catharina Kennedy23岁。她于1549年8月2日与Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾特藍特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1604年11月13日在苏格兰雷福福爾雷福盧享年74岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安特藍特。

nameMeanings.name: Hamilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from what is now a deserted village in the parish of Barkby, Leicestershire. This is named from Old English hamel ‘crooked’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hamilton near Glasgow was founded by the English Hamiltons and named after them, and later bearers took their surname from the Scottish place. In the north of Ireland, where many Hamiltons settled in the 17th century, this surname may sometimes have been adopted for Hamill . It has also been adopted as an Anglicized form of southern Irish Ó hUrmholtaigh.

History: This name is borne by one of the most distinguished families of the Scottish nobility; they hold many titles, including marquessate and dukedom of Hamilton, the marquessate of Douglas, the dukedom of Abercorn, and the earldom of Haddington. They are descended from Walter FitzGilbert de Hameldone, a Norman baron who gave his support to Robert the Bruce in the 13th century. A member of this family was Sir William Hamilton (1730–1803), a British diplomat and archaeologist, whose wife, Lady Emma Hamilton (c. 1765–1815), became the mistress of Admiral Horatio Nelson. A branch of the family was established in Ireland by Sir Frederick Hamilton (died 1646), who served in the Swedish army of Gustavus Adolphus. He later became governor of Ulster, and his descendants were created viscounts Boyne. The family have given their name to Newtownhamilton and Hamiltonsbaron in County Armagh. Another branch of the family were to be found in Denmark, where Henrik Albertsen Hamilton (1588–1648) was a noted Latin poet. A 17th-century example of a Hamilton from Glasgow, Scotland, is recorded in the Netherlands, where the name is found in the form Hamelton. Another Scottish Hamilton, James, went to the West Indies in the 18th century and was the father of Alexander Hamilton (1755–1804), who arrived in NY in 1772 and became the first US secretary of the Treasury.

variants.name: Hamill
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Haineville or Henneville in Manche, France, named from the ancient Germanic personal name Hagano + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
English (Lancashire): nickname for a maimed person or someone with a distinctive scar, from Middle English, Old English hamel ‘mutilated, scarred’.
Irish (Ulster): according to MacLysaght, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁdhmaill ‘descendant of Ádhmall’, which he derives from ádhmall ‘active’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar was born in 1530, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar, was 30 and her mother, Catharina Kennedy, was 23. She married Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC on 2 August 1549, in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 13 November 1604, in Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 74, and was buried in Tranent, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar est née en 1530, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Catharina Kennedy, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC le 2 août 1549, à Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 novembre 1604, à Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Tranent, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar 1530 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar 30 und ihre Mutter Catharina Kennedy 23. Sie hat am 2. August 1549 in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. November 1604 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Tranent, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar è nata il nel 1530 nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Catharina Kennedy, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC il 2 agosto 1549, nel Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 novembre 1604, nel Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Tranent, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Hamilton of Sanquharが1530年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquharは30歳，母Catharina Kennedyは23歳であった。1549年8月2日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアトランエントでSir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PCと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1604年11月13日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアレンフリューで74歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアントランエントにて埋葬された。

ko.Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto: 이탈리아 븐토 트레비소 메던아 디 라이븐자 머
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar(이)가 1530년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catharina Kennedy(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1549년 8월 2일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 트랜트에서 Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1604년 11월 13일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 렌프레에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 트랜트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar nasceu em 1530, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Catharina Kennedy, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC em 2 de agosto de 1549, em Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1604, em Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Tranent, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Mure, Meduna di Livenza, Treviso, Veneto: мур, медуна ди ливенза, тревисо, винето, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar родилась в 1530 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Catharina Kennedy, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC 2 августа 1549 г. в местности транент, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 ноября 1604 г. в местности ренфрю, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности транент, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.Seton Collegiate Church, Tranent, East L: Tranent, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar nació en 1530, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Willem Hamilton Laird van MacKneirstom en Sanquhar, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Catharina Kennedy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC el 2 de agosto de 1549, en Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1604, en Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Tranent, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
